page: Microsoft Azure E8s_v3 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the ESv3 family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor running at 2.6 GHz, offering 8 vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The memory configuration is 64.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It is equipped with 131 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. No GPUs are included in this configuration.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between compute and memory capabilities. While raw CPU processing is relatively weak, with stress-ng single-core and multi-core scores in the bottom 25%, memory performance is more robust. Memory bandwidth tests show average tier results, reaching 365.1 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 42.29 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. Redis SET operations perform at an average level of 6.16 million operations per second, and PassMark database operations also fall into the average category.

The qualitative cost efficiency of the E8s_v3 is defined by its high memory density relative to its compute resources. It trades off high-speed CPU performance for a larger memory footprint, making it less suitable for compute-heavy tasks like image processing or LLM inference, but highly appropriate for memory-bound workloads. This server is best suited for relational databases, in-memory caching systems like Redis, and software compilation tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure E8s_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the ESv3 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor. It features 8 vCPUs across 4 physical cores, 64.0 GB of RAM, and 131 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under Microsoft Hyper-V, this server provides a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Benchmark data reveals a tradeoff: while single-core and multi-core CPU performance is positioned in the bottom 25%, memory bandwidth and database operations achieve average tier results, with Redis SET operations reaching 6.16 million operations per second. Consequently, the E8s_v3 is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-intensive workloads rather than compute-heavy tasks. It is best suited for databases, in-memory caching, and software compilation.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E8s_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 8 vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 131 GB local storage. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor under Microsoft Hyper-V virtualization.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E8s_v3 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server with 8 vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 131 GB local storage, running on an Intel Xeon processor.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring a high RAM-to-vCPU ratio and local storage for memory-intensive database and caching workloads.
